name: launch_week_activation_rate
definition: % of engaged segment who clicked launch email CTA and completed signup or core activation within 7 days.
target_hint: 8–20% for warm dev-tool list; <5% → offer or LP mismatch.

name: engaged_segment_open_rate
definition: Unique opens / delivered on engaged segment for launch wave 1.

name: unsubscribe_spike_launch_week
definition: Unsubs / delivered across all launch emails in launch week.

name: onboarding_d7_activation
definition: % of launch signups completing onboarding email #1 action by D+7.

name: drip_to_launch_attribution
definition: Launch-week signups with UTM utm_medium=email and utm_campaign=prelaunch_drip or launch_wave_N.
target_hint: Track per wave; no aggregate 'email drove X' without UTM.
